name: Do Up
short_description: Do Up is a minimalist, troll-like 3D parkour game. Your goal? Finish in the shortest time possible.
detailed_description:
You have been selected for an ultra-advanced experiment to evaluate a simulation. Your goal: finish as fast as possible while testing your perseverance, patience, and reflexes.

Do Up is a minimalist 3D platform game in which you use your parkour skills and that challenges you throughout the game. Overcome fast obstacles and challenge your own records.

Simple, Yet Ruthless

Don’t be fooled by the clean design. The minimalist look hides a relentless challenge—every move is an opportunity to fail. But victory… it’s within your reach. How many attempts will it take before you break?

Ready for the Ultimate Test?

If you think you're good at parkour, Do Up will push you even further. Dodge obstacles, break limits, and conquer yourself. The question isn’t if you’ll fail, but when—and what you’ll do next.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
